title: Panachikkadu Temple
tagline: Panachikkadu Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: The Panachikkadu Temple or Panachikkad Saraswathi Temple, also known as the Dakshina Mookambika (Mookambika of the South) Saraswathy Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to the godd
overview.description: The Panachikkadu Temple or Panachikkad Saraswathi Temple, also known as the Dakshina Mookambika (Mookambika of the South) Saraswathy Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to the goddess Saraswati. The temple is located in the southern region of the Indian Peninsula, in Panachikkad in Kottayam District, Kerala, India. The main deity of the temple is Vishnu, who was installed before Saraswati. There are sub-shrines for Shiva, Ganapathi, Ayyappan, Snake deities and Panachikkattu Yakshi inside the temple.

topPlaces.name: Panachikkad
topPlaces.description: Panachikkad is a city in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Eravinalloor
topPlaces.description: Eravinalloor is a village in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India, situated 9 km (5.6 mi) from Kottayam town. The village is near Puthuppally and is located on the banks of the Kodoor River.

topPlaces.name: Kuzhimattom
topPlaces.description: Kuzhimattom is a small village in the Kottayam district of the Kerala state, India. It is about 11 km from Kottayam.

topPlaces.name: Pentecostal Theological Seminary, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Pentecostal Theological Seminary, Kottayam formerly IPC Theological Seminary, Kottayam (IPCTSK) also known as the Kottayam Theological Seminary, is a Pentecostal theological seminary situated in, Kottayam, Kerala, India. It provides undergraduate and postgraduate theological education in residential, distance and online modes, and operates under the auspices of the IPC Educational & Welfare Society in connection with the Indian Pentecostal Church of God.

topPlaces.name: Puthuppally, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Puthuppally is a town in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. The community is known for its ancient Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church, Puthuppally Palli.

topPlaces.name: Kadamuri Narasimhaswamy Temple, Kadamuri
topPlaces.description: Kadamuri Narasimhaswamy Temple is a famous Narasimhaswamy temple in Kerala. It is located at Kadamuri of Kottayam district, in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Vakathanam
topPlaces.description: Vakathanam is a Panchayat in Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) from Kottayam on the way to Changanassery via Puthupally.

topPlaces.name: Manikandapuram
topPlaces.description: Manikandapuram was the capital of the Kingdom of Thekkumkur (now part of India). Manikandapuram is a part of Vakathanam Gramam in the Changanassery Taluk of Kottayam District.

It provides undergraduate and postgraduate theological education in residential, distance and online modes, and operates under the auspices of the IPC Educational & Welfare Society in connection with the Indian Pentecostal Church of God.

Vakathanam is a Panchayat in Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) from Kottayam on the way to Changanassery via Puthupally.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Panachikkadu Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Panachikkadu Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Panachikkadu Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Panachikkadu Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Panachikkadu Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Panachikkadu Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Panachikkadu Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Panachikkadu Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Panachikkad, Eravinalloor, Kuzhimattom, Pentecostal Theological Seminary, Kottayam, Puthuppally, Kottayam.
